archetype: Swiss Dark Cinematic (Archetype 5 + 4 hybrid for TV)

rules: Avoid 'Inter' completely. Use Cabinet Grotesk for dramatic, premium headings and Outfit for highly legible body text on TVs.
Text must be massively upscaled compared to web apps for 10ft TV UI readability. The minimum functional text size is text-lg.
Headings must use tight letter spacing (tracking-tighter) for a cinematic poster feel.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: 10ft UI (TV-First). Oversized spacing, predictable grid movements, zero clutter.

focus_state.description: CRITICAL for TV navigation via D-pad. The user must always know exactly where they are.
focus_state.classes: focus:outline-none focus:ring-4 focus:ring-[#FFB800] focus:ring-offset-4 focus:ring-offset-[#050505] focus:scale-105 transition-all duration-200 z-10 relative

buttons.primary: bg-[#FFB800] text-black font-bold rounded-lg px-8 py-5 text-xl lg:text-2xl hover:bg-[#FFD147] focus:ring-4 focus:ring-white focus:scale-105 transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-[#111111] text-white border-2 border-neutral-800 rounded-lg px-8 py-5 text-xl lg:text-2xl hover:border-neutral-600 focus:border-[#FFB800] focus:bg-[#1A1A1A] focus:scale-105 transition-all

cards.poster: aspect-[2/3] rounded-xl overflow-hidden bg-neutral-900 border-4 border-transparent transition-all duration-200
cards.live_channel: aspect-video rounded-xl bg-neutral-900 flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-6 border-4 border-transparent transition-all duration-200
cards.interaction: hover:scale-105 focus:scale-110 focus:border-[#FFB800] focus:shadow-[0_0_40px_rgba(255,184,0,0.4)] focus:z-20 cursor-pointer outline-none

inputs.text: bg-[#111111] border-2 border-neutral-800 text-white rounded-lg px-6 py-5 text-xl w-full focus:outline-none focus:border-[#FFB800] focus:bg-[#1A1A1A] transition-colors placeholder:text-neutral-600

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Used selectively for the video player overlay and floating sidebar. Use 'bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-2xl border-white/10' for high-end optical clarity.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Deep ambient shadows on focused elements: 'shadow-[0_0_40px_rgba(255,184,0,0.15)]'.
visual_enhancers.borders: No borders on idle items. Sharp 4px borders appear strictly on focus/hover to guide the eye.

image_urls.description: Abstract grid pattern with colorful blurred lights behind. Used as the main background for the Xtream/M3U login screen.
Mystical black texture with floating dust. Used as a subtle blend-mode overlay on the dashboard hero section to add cinematic depth.

instructions_to_main_agent: Design specifically for Smart TVs (10ft UI). Desktop is a secondary use case. Ensure everything is navigable via keyboard arrows (simulating a TV D-pad).
EVERY interactable element MUST have the focus state classes defined in the guidelines (scale + gold ring). This is the absolute most critical feature of a TV app.
Use 'es' (Spanish) for all interface text: 'Películas', 'Series', 'En Vivo', 'Favoritos', 'Iniciar Sesión', 'Usuario', 'Contraseña', 'URL del Servidor'.
DO NOT use generic purple/violet gradients. Strictly follow the Deep Black (#050505) + Electric Amber (#FFB800) palette.
Import 'Cabinet Grotesk' for headings and 'Outfit' for body text. Apply them heavily.
Add 'data-testid' attributes to all inputs, buttons, and media cards (e.g., data-testid='login-button').
Implement horizontal scrolling for media rows using CSS (flex-row overflow-x-auto snap-x scroll-smooth) and ensure arrow keys scroll the focused item into view.
For the Video Player, implement a full-screen overlay with large controls that appear on activity and auto-hide on inactivity.
Ensure input fields are clearly distinguishable and huge. Use the inputs.text classes provided.
